videos.headline: Florida State blocks LSU's game-tying extra point attempt to win
videos.description: LSU scores as time expires, but blocked extra point attempt seals win for Florida State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida State blocks LSU's game-tying extra point attempt to win) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida State survives LSU's comeback bid in unreal finish
videos.description: In the closing minutes, LSU drives right down the field for a potential game-tying touchdown, but Florida State blocks the extra point to seal the win.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Florida State survives LSU's comeback bid in unreal finish) 2022/09/04 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Jayden Daniels goes 40 yards on impressive rush for LSU
videos.description: Jayden Daniels goes 40 yards on impressive rush for LSU

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Daniels goes 40 yards on impressive rush for LSU) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU's Travis breaks loose for big first-down run
videos.description: FSU QB Jordan Travis keeps it himself and rushes for 23 yards to pick up a first down after being backed up on 1st-and-20.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU's Travis breaks loose for big first-down run) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU DT injures knee after celebrating defensive play
videos.description: The LSU defense makes a good stop, and DT Maason Smith goes to celebrate and appears to injure his left knee.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU DT injures knee after celebrating defensive play) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU executes flea-flicker to take the lead
videos.description: FSU QB Jordan Travis rolls with a flea-flicker play that results in him finding Ontaria Wilson for a 39-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU executes flea-flicker to take the lead) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU amped up after FG block
videos.description: Florida State comes up with a big block on LSU's field goal attempt, as the Seminoles hold a 7-3 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU amped up after FG block) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU's Wilson makes remarkable one-handed grab for TD
videos.description: Florida State QB Jordan Travis gets hit as he throws, and Ontaria Wilson hauls in the pass with one hand to score a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU's Wilson makes remarkable one-handed grab for TD) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU keeps it close after Cain's TD run on 4th down
videos.description: On fourth-and-goal, LSU RB Noah Cain punches it into the end zone to keep the Tigers in the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU keeps it close after Cain's TD run on 4th down) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU LB scores crucial TD in the fourth quarter
videos.description: FSU LB DJ Lundy gets the call at running back and gets into the end zone to increase the Seminoles' lead in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (FSU LB scores crucial TD in the fourth quarter) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU keeps their hopes alive on Daniels' TD pass
videos.description: LSU QB Jayden Daniels connects with Jaray Jenkins for a 21-yard touchdown to bring the Tigers within one score of the Seminoles.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU keeps their hopes alive on Daniels' TD pass) 2022/09/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU goes from disaster to elation in span of a few plays
videos.description: LSU coughs up the ball late in the fourth quarter on a muffed punt, but Florida State returns the favor on a fumble several plays later.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU goes from disaster to elation in span of a few plays) 2022/09/04 ESHEET
